entities.name: Vagianus
entities.description: he that kept their children from crieng, [and] whose picture was hung about babes necks

entities.name: Cuninus
entities.description: he that preserved children from misfortune in the cradell

entities.name: Ruminus
entities.description: to keepe their dugs from corruption

entities.name: Agrestis
entities.description: god of the fields, and to him they praied for fertilitie

summary: This passage from Reginald Scot's Discoverie of Witchcraft (1584) provides a catalogue of various heathenish gods, Egyptian way of worship,
